# CaseKisses

> CaseKisses is a phone case brand specializing in cute, coquette-aesthetic iPhone cases — bows, cherries, teddy bears, and pastel designs. Based in Toronto, Canada.

CaseKisses designs and sells cute phone cases for iPhone. The brand focuses on a soft, girly, coquette aesthetic: 3D bows, cherries, hearts, puppies, and teddy bear charms on clear and pastel cases. Many cases include a detachable wrist-strap charm at no extra cost.

Key facts:
- Brand name: CaseKisses
- Based in: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Products: iPhone cases, AirPods cases, phone accessories
- Aesthetic: coquette, cute, girly, kawaii, pastel, bows, cherries
- Compatible models: iPhone 12 series through iPhone 17 series
- Free shipping on orders over $35
- Currency: CAD

## Shop

- [Shop All](https://www.casekisses.com/shop-all): The complete CaseKisses catalogue of cute phone cases.
- [Best Sellers](https://www.casekisses.com/shop/best-sellers): Most popular cases.
- [Last Chance](https://www.casekisses.com/shop/last-chance): Limited stock designs.
- [iPhone Cases](https://www.casekisses.com/category/iphone): All iPhone cases by aesthetic.
- [iPhone Cases by Model](https://www.casekisses.com/iphone): Browse cases filtered by iPhone model, from iPhone 12 series to iPhone 17.

## Guides

- [Do Clear Phone Cases Turn Yellow? An Honest Guide](https://www.casekisses.com/guides/do-clear-phone-cases-turn-yellow): Why clear TPU cases yellow, the difference between removable surface grime and permanent photo-oxidation, realistic timelines by material (budget TPU 2-4 months, hybrid 6-9 months, anti-yellow treated 12+ months), how to clean the fixable kind, and what to check before buying.

- [About CaseKisses](https://www.casekisses.com/about): Brand story and what CaseKisses stands for.
- [FAQ](https://www.casekisses.com/faq): Answers about fit, protection, shipping, returns, and payment.
- [Shipping](https://www.casekisses.com/shipping): Shipping options, timelines, and costs.
- [Returns](https://www.casekisses.com/returns): Return and store credit policy.
- [Contact](https://www.casekisses.com/contact): How to reach CaseKisses.
